untranslatable_reason: This signal requires calculation and storage of dynamic price objectives based on measured leg length (L) and Rule of Seven multipliers. The backtest engine cannot compute: (1) automatic detection of initial leg length from extreme points, (2) identification of pullback completion, (3) dynamic target calculation using formulas like 'prior_low + (L × 7/4)', and (4) tracking multiple price objectives (upwards_objective_1/2/3, downwards_objective_1/2/3). These require state management and complex pattern recognition beyond simple indicator conditions. Signal is translatable to a trend-following entry/exit logic only, but loses the core Rule of Seven targeting mechanism.
translation_notes: Converted to basic trend-following entry/exit (price above/below previous extremes) as a proxy for trend confirmation, but this does NOT implement the actual Rule of Seven price objective calculation. A full implementation would require custom indicator development or a position-management module that tracks leg length and applies the multiplier formulas to set dynamic profit targets.
